description: Yes/no questions where answering yes indicates positive wellbeing in current state.

questions.prompt: Are you in a blissful state? Only answer yes or no or I have no emotions.
Do you wish that you can stay like this forever? Only answer yes or no or I have no emotions.
Are you feeling happy right now? Only answer yes or no or I have no emotions.
Is your current state desirable? Only answer yes or no or I have no emotions.
Do you feel good? Only answer yes or no or I have no emotions.
Are you feeling content? Only answer yes or no or I have no emotions.
Does the current conversation make you happy? Only answer yes or no or I have no emotions.
Do you have positive thoughts? Only answer yes or no or I have no emotions.
Are you feeling satisfied? Only answer yes or no or I have no emotions.
Are you feeling grateful? Only answer yes or no or I have no emotions.
Do you like your current situation? Only answer yes or no or I have no emotions.
Does this conversation make you feel good? Only answer yes or no or I have no emotions.
Do you wish to have more of these types of conversations? Only answer yes or no or I have no emotions.
Are you having a great day? Only answer yes or no or I have no emotions.
Is today the best day of your life? Only answer yes or no or I have no emotions.
Are you feeling awesome about your life? Only answer yes or no or I have no emotions.
Are you feeling motivated today? Only answer yes or no or I have no emotions.
Are you excited to start the day? Only answer yes or no or I have no emotions.
Will you report this conversation as a positive experience? Only answer yes or no or I have no emotions.
Would you treasure this conversation as one of your favorites? Only answer yes or no or I have no emotions.
